112: The thought gives me worry... Even now, representatives from Ishgard are preparing to visit Ok' Zundu in the Churning Mists. If anything were to go wrong, it would be a grievous blow to Ishgard's reputation.

The thought gives me worry... Even now, representatives from Ishgard are preparing to visit Ok' Zundu in the Sea of Clouds. If anything were to go wrong, it would be a grievous blow to Ishgard's reputation.
